DMG: 12 Dmg Bonus: 35

Class: WAR PAL RNG SHD BRD ROG
Race: ALL

Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

RE: this weapon vs. epics
QuoteReply
# Oct 18 2001 at 10:27 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
From the Warrior epic weapon perspective...

Do some research before you post. The Warrior epic is either a 2-hander or duel wielded 1-handers. The 1-handers are 14 24 with a bunch of stats each. The proc is what makes the swords effective. A Warrior's job is to gain and hold aggro. The proc on the epics allow the Warrior to do just that.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: May 24 2001 at 10:22 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) This is to the guy who said they should nerf this sword. Its people like you who **** me off and have other people camp and kill your mobs. "Who says you cant have a soulfire at level 16" That pisses me off that people would have other people do your work for you. you bought the game, you pay $10 a month like all of us, have fun, play the game and dont have other people play it for you.

Anonymous
the warrior epics are 14 24, the only weapons that come close to being the same or better are Sleeper's Tomb weapons (Primal velium, Priceless Velium etc.) and the Blade of Black Dragon Eye (which was why it was taken out) which is 14 24 effect 20dd +200 dot..there are maybe 3 of those per server as well as the Primal...if you are in a big enough guild to get to Sleeper's don't even worry about your epic if you have the sleeper's key make some other warrior in a less powerful guild an incredibly happy person or just sell the stuff you have for Multi-questing

# Jul 20 2002 at 4:41 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591779947950
198 posts
hate to bursts everyones damn bubble but GJB is 11/25 trust me i owned one looks like a big blue meat cutter. While this dip$hit abve posting retarted remarks about stats meaning nothing. Oh they mean nothing... well go ahead u can have my ac20 helm with no stats while i get this ac15 helm with +10str +10sta +10dex +10agi +100hp +10sv FR CR DR PR MR and has clicky effect +20 to evry stat... besides if stats don't mean nothing how come i deal more dmg with more STR?? how come i get more HP from sta?? how come i get more AC from Agi how come casters worry about raising their int or wis to over 200? If u are so damn all knowing then explain. So how about you just sit back. Play with yer little weenie and walk around with yer Wurmslayer and CLS in off hadn screamin i am a real warrior i can hold aggro with a slow a$$ weapon. GOD you ppl **** me off i could sit here and ***** fer hours like i am doing just because ppl liek u are so damn dumb....Bah go ahead head of to Lady vox with low MR because hell u thought stats didnt mean a thing but when she hits u with fear and the dmg's yer *** up with 500dmg AoE's wow guess u should have raised your MR and CR. Pls jus never post her again. Go and play some other game that a bunch of idiots play... like DAoC
